title: Purémon
description: This modpack is based around Cobblemon, with addons adding trainers, breeding, currency, structures, furniture, megas, and more.
body:
This modpack is based around Cobblemon, with addons adding trainers, breeding, currency, structures, furniture, megas, and more. 

There’s options available for the pack, such as shaders, a resource pack for the trainers and music, and a mod you can enable to remove all vanilla mob spawns.

Many quality of life and performance mods are also included in the pack.

The trainers are set to "free roam," giving more flexibilty with progression.
